step.title: Step 55
step.actionDisplay: DOWN -> LEFT -> LEFT -> LEFT -> LEFT -> LEFT -> LEFT

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the board has returned to a state very similar to the initial state:
- Charcoal (dark gray L-shape) on the left side, near the divider
- Avatar (black with dots) on the right side, near the divider
- Target (yellow L-shape) on the far left, bottom area
The DOWN + 6 LEFT moves seem to have reset the board to a state similar to the beginning. The charcoal is back to its original position on the left side.
Let me check the current positions to confirm, and then try a completely different strategy. Maybe I should:
1. First move the avatar to the LEFT side of the divider
2. Then move the avatar around to push the charcoal from the same side
Or maybe the goal is to move the AVATAR to the TARGET, not the charcoal to the target.
Let me check the current state and try moving the avatar LEFT to cross the divider.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('B', 'c', 'Y') and n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in b)
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in b)
        r_max = max(p[0] for p in b)
        c_max = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} top={r_min} left={c_min} bot={r_max} right={c_max}")

# Board looks reset. Charcoal back on left, avatar on right.
# New strategy: try moving avatar LEFT to cross divider to left side
# Then see if charcoal responds when both on same side
# Avatar at left=45, divider at ~48. Need to move LEFT to cross.
# But LEFT moves charcoal RIGHT (opposite direction)
# Let me try 2 LEFT moves to cross the divider
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"RIGHT": "Moves avatar +3 cols, charcoal moves -3", "LEFT": "Moves avatar -3 cols, charcoal moves +3", "DOWN": "Moves avatar +3 rows, charcoal moves -3", "UP": "Moves avatar -3 rows, charcoal moves +3; can cause charcoal to split/wrap", "SPACE": "Moves avatar UP 3 rows only in specific conditions", "MOUSE": "No effect", "ACTION7": "No effect"}, "object_taxonomy": {"black_with_dots": "Player avatar", "charcoal_shape": "Moves OPPOSITE to avatar, wraps around edges, can split", "yellow_shape": "Target", "sky_blue_strip": "Vertical divider"}, "hud_map": {"right_col": "Yellow strip - timer"}, "win_pattern": "Get charcoal shape to overlap yellow target", "level_log": {"level_1": "Completed", "level_2": "Board reset after DOWN+6 LEFT. Trying to cross divider."}, "cross_level_notes": "Charcoal wraps/reappears when pushed off board"}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Board reset. Charcoal on left, avatar on right. Trying to cross divider with LEFT.", "goal_model": "Push charcoal onto target", "recent_findings": ["DOWN+6 LEFT reset board to initial state"], "open_questions": ["What happens when avatar crosses divider to left side?"], "current_plan": "Cross divider with LEFT, then explore mechanics on left side", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": []}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
